title: Targeted C‐to‐T Base Editing in the Arabidopsis Plastid Genome
author: Nakazato, Arimura
materials: Platinum Gate TALEN Kit (Addgene, cat. no. 1000000043)
rCutSmartTM Buffer (New England Biolabs, cat. no. B6004S)
BsaI‐HFv2 (New England Biolabs, cat. no. R3733L)
Competent Quick DH5a (TOYOBO, cat. no. DNA‐913F)
SOC medium (e.g., that included with E. coli HST08 Premium Competent Cells, TaKaRa, cat. no. 9128)
Plasmid extraction kit (e.g., Nippon Genetics, cat. no. FG‐90502)
Extraction of total DNA: half a day

steps.title: Basic Protocol 1, Assembly Steps 1 and 2
steps.instruction: If desired plasmids are not obtained, the use of fresh BsaI‐HFv2, BsmBI, Quick Ligase, and their corresponding reaction buffers may help resolve the issue.

steps.title: Basic Protocol 1, step 32
steps.instruction: If desired plasmids are not obtained, it is recommended to use fresh LR Clonase™ II Plus or to extend the reaction time to ≥40 hr.

steps.title: Basic Protocol 1, steps 43 to 45
steps.instruction: If incomplete plasmid digestion occurs, it is recommended to use fresh enzymes and to extend the reaction time to ensure optimal digestion.

steps.title: Basic Protocol 3, step 2
steps.instruction: If the number of GFP‐positive seeds is small, it is recommended to increase the number of Col‐0 plants subjected to floral dipping to enhance the likelihood of obtaining transformants.

steps.title: Basic Protocol 3, step 15
steps.instruction: If the target base is not substituted, but other bases several nucleotides away are modified, this issue may be addressed by designing constructs with the TALE recognition sequence shifted by several nucleotides and repeating the experiment. Additionally, when both the target base and adjacent bases are substituted, it is possible to isolate T2 null segregants in which only the target base is homoplasmically substituted while the other bases are wild type.

steps.title: Basic Protocol 2
steps.instruction: Duration from Agrobacterium‐mediated transformation to the harvesting of T1 seeds: 5 weeks

steps.title: Basic Protocol 3
steps.instruction: Duration from selecting T1 seeds exhibiting GFP fluorescence to completing genotyping: 3 weeks

steps.title: Basic Protocol 3
steps.instruction: Duration until the collection of T2 seeds: 1.5 to 2 months

steps.title: Basic Protocol 3
steps.instruction: Duration from selecting T2 seeds not exhibiting GFP fluorescence to completing genotyping: 3 weeks

steps.title: Basic Protocol 3
steps.instruction: Duration until obtaining the results of NGS: 1 to 2 months
